applied-python-projects.title: Applied Python Projects: Object-Oriented Apps
applied-python-projects.description: A cumulative, project-first Python course where learners build object-oriented apps across multiple files and finish with a complete OOP capstone.
applied-python-projects.moreComingSoon: More Applied Python Projects: Object-Oriented Apps lessons are coming soon.

python-8-object-oriented-foundations.title: Object-Oriented Foundations
python-8-object-oriented-foundations.description: Start with a beginner-friendly introduction to objects and responsibility, then build class files, constructors, methods, and encapsulated state across a small multifile app.
outcomes: Explain how objects group related data and behavior before writing your own classes.
Define classes in dedicated model files and import them into main.py.
Use constructors, attributes, and methods to keep object behavior with object state.
Apply encapsulation with validation and helper/service files.
why: Builds confidence with object-oriented foundations in a smoother ramp.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

python-9-inheritance-polymorphism-and-ab.title: Inheritance, Polymorphism, and Abstraction
python-9-inheritance-polymorphism-and-ab.description: Extend the object model with shared base classes, overrides, mixed collections, and simple interface thinking.
outcomes: Use inheritance to share behavior across related classes.
Override methods when subclasses need specialized behavior.
Use polymorphism and simple abstraction so services can work with mixed object types.
why: Builds confidence with inheritance, polymorphism, and abstraction.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

python-10-testing-debugging-oop-projects.title: Testing and Debugging OOP Projects
python-10-testing-debugging-oop-projects.description: Test object state, subclass behavior, polymorphic services, imports, fixtures, and refactors in multifile apps.
outcomes: Write tests for object state changes, validation rules, and subclass overrides.
Debug import errors and object-state bugs in multifile workspaces.
Refactor main.py into model/service/test files while preserving behavior.
why: Builds confidence with testing and debugging oop projects.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

python-11-oop-capstone-project.title: Final OOP Capstone Project
python-11-oop-capstone-project.description: Build and polish a smart task tracker that uses encapsulation, abstraction, inheritance, and polymorphism.
outcomes: Design a clear file architecture for a multifile OOP app.
Use all four OOP pillars in one working project.
Add storage, reporting, tests, and documentation to finish a polished capstone.
why: Builds confidence with final oop capstone project.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

applied-python-projects-python-8-object-.title: Object Foundations
applied-python-projects-python-8-object-.description: Start with what objects are for, then move into class files, instances, constructors, and state.

applied-python-projects-python-8-encapsu.title: Encapsulation and Services
applied-python-projects-python-8-encapsu.description: Add methods, validation, and helper files so each object owns its behavior.

applied-python-projects-python-8-module-.title: Module Project
applied-python-projects-python-8-module-.description: Build an account tracker one cumulative step at a time.

applied-python-projects-python-9-inherit.title: Inheritance and Overrides
applied-python-projects-python-9-inherit.description: Use parent classes for shared behavior and subclasses for specialization.

applied-python-projects-python-9-polymor.title: Polymorphism and Abstraction
applied-python-projects-python-9-polymor.description: Use common method names and base-class contracts to keep services flexible.

applied-python-projects-python-9-module-.title: Module Project
applied-python-projects-python-9-module-.description: Build a polymorphic catalog one cumulative step at a time.

applied-python-projects-python-10-testin.title: Testing OOP Behavior
applied-python-projects-python-10-testin.description: Write tests for methods, state changes, subclass overrides, and polymorphic loops.

applied-python-projects-python-10-debugg.title: Debugging and Refactoring
applied-python-projects-python-10-debugg.description: Fix import/state problems and move code into services without changing behavior.

applied-python-projects-python-10-module.title: Module Project
applied-python-projects-python-10-module.description: Harden an OOP project with tests, storage, and regression coverage.

applied-python-projects-python-11-capsto.title: Capstone Architecture
applied-python-projects-python-11-capsto.description: Plan the app structure and build the core domain model.

applied-python-projects-python-11-capsto.title: Capstone Services and Polish
applied-python-projects-python-11-capsto.description: Add storage, reports, tests, polish, and documentation.

applied-python-projects-python-11-final-.title: Final Capstone
applied-python-projects-python-11-final-.description: Complete the Smart Task Tracker through cumulative graded steps.
